  echo "=== Strings in $dir that are NOT in main values ==="

  comm -23 /tmp/${dir}_keys.txt /tmp/main_keys.txt | head -20
done)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import re
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET

# Read main strings.xml
with open\('/d/WorkFiles/Android/AndroidProjects/company/InmoClaw/app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Find all strings
strings_data = []
root = ET.fromstring\(content\)
for string_elem in root.findall\('string'\):
    name = string_elem.get\('name'\)
    text = string_elem.text or ''
    
    # Check for Chinese characters \(CJK Unified Ideographs\)
    if re.search\(r'[\\u4e00-\\u9fff]', text\):
        strings_data.append\(\(name, text\)\)

print\("=== Strings in main values/strings.xml with Chinese characters ===\\n"\)
for name, text in strings_data:
    print\(f'{name}: {text}'\)
EOF)
